name: distill
description: Human-supervised distillation of harvested AI-tool knowledge into the shared instruction sources. Orchestrates ~/bin/ai-harvest and ~/bin/ai-distill (prepare/gate/apply) around a skills-guided inference middle with per-stage model tiers; the session writes the distilled ai/ directly in a git worktree off the live path, the operator reviews the diff, and apply merges it into the live ai/. Binding requirements: docs/ai-pipeline-threat-model.md §7.
